_meta.threshold_rationale: ±0.03 typical 20-fixture LLM variance; 0.05 catches true regressions without false-positive noise. See [[feedback-529-contamination-awareness]] for variance bands.

suites.name: phone_20

suites.name: pii_20

suites.name: direction_arrow_20

suites.name: phone_60
suites.note: 60-fixture scaled suite — 20 seed + 40 auto-scaled; 7 hand-curated; matches phone_20 (0.9575) within noise; statistically more reliable

suites.name: pii20_60
suites.note: 35-fixture scaled suite (corpus-limited; real_estate_rental cluster only 131 imgs after dedup) — 20 seed + 15 auto-scaled; 7 hand-curated; Δ -0.0113 vs pii_20 0.9788, within noise

suites.name: direction_arrow_60
suites.note: 54-fixture scaled suite — 20 seed + 34 auto-scaled; 7 hand-curated. 2 API errors in v1 run (image_7162 90s timeout + image_3798 HTTP 500 sensitive-image); 52-fixture clean composite = 0.9549; full 54-fixture = 0.9337 (Δ -0.021 from contamination). Threshold band [0.88, 0.98].

suites.name: service_institution_60
suites.note: 60-fixture Phase I suite — 13th intent, OBSERVE family, targets 514-imgs service_institution cluster. 5 categories (medical 21 / education 20 / government_admin 11 / financial 5 / government_law 3). 1 API error (image_6117 HTTP 500 sensitive-image); 59-fixture clean composite = 0.9608; full 60-fixture = 0.9508 (Δ -0.010). Threshold band [0.90, 1.00].
